title: dortmanna pratioides
intro: Dortmanna pratioides, also known as Pratia angulata, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dortmanna pratioides include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or used as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
